info.name: Returns all appealable issues of the selected appeal type for a claimant.

params.name: benefitType
params.description: Type of benefit. Required if decisionReviewType is higher-level-reviews or supplemental-claims. Ignored if decisionReviewType is notice-of-disagreements.

params.name: receiptDate
params.description: (yyyy-mm-dd) Cutoff date for requested issues. The API returns issues that have been decided as of this date. This date must be after 2019-02-19, the Appeals Modernization Act (AMA) activation date.

params.name: icn
params.description: Claimant's Integration Control Number (ICN). Optional when using a veteran-scoped token. Required when using a representative- or system-scoped token.

items.docs: Returns all issues of the selected appeal type associated with a claimant that have been decided as of the `receiptDate`. Not all issues returned are guaranteed to be eligible for appeal.
